summary: While the role offers the predictable daytime hours and excellent work-life balance you desire, the core cognitive demands are a fundamental mismatch with your stated struggles in mathematics and analytical reasoning. The job requires non-negotiable, high-stakes calculations involving radioactive decay factors where errors necessitate federal reporting, likely leading to extreme stress and career instability. Despite your strength in procedural work, the intense analytical pressure and emotional weight of oncology imaging make this position unsustainable for your specific profile.
